name_cn:
CHANEL 22 Bag Medium Olive Green
True pure A (White Tag) Grade A calfskin👍
Fine and lustrous leather, soft and wear-resistant at the same time
Simple appearance hides many designer's high-end designs, hollowed-out Chanel logo coins, small embellishments that elevate the overall temperament by more than one level, full of vintage sentiment, a loose and lazy feel! 🍃
Dimensions: 39*42*8cm
